allow: Bash(cd "/Users/nocap/Downloads/Virenza - O/public" && sips -g pixelWidth -g pixelHeight asset-6.png)

Bash(pip3 install pillow -q && cd "/Users/nocap/Downloads/Virenza - O/public" && python3 - <<'EOF'
from PIL import Image

img = Image.open\("asset-6.png"\)
w, h = img.size
hw, hh = w // 2, h // 2

img.crop\(\(0,  0,  hw, hh\)\).save\("asset-6-1.png"\)
img.crop\(\(hw, 0,  w,  hh\)\).save\("asset-6-2.png"\)
img.crop\(\(0,  hh, hw, h \)\).save\("asset-6-3.png"\)
img.crop\(\(hw, hh, w,  h \)\).save\("asset-6-4.png"\)
print\("Done", w, h\)
EOF)
